name: Osprey Solana Trust
business: Osprey Solana Trust is a grantor trust that holds SOL, a digital asset, and issues shares representing fractional undivided beneficial interests in the SOL held by the Trust. The shares trade on the CBOE BZX Exchange. The value of the Shares relates directly to the value of SOL held by the Trust.
sellsTo: investors on the CBOE BZX Exchange

exposures.sentence: SOL is a digital asset that is created and transmitted through the operations of the peer-to-peer Solana Network, a decentralized network of computers that operates on cryptographic protocols.
